name: ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Utility spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 40,000
Insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 40,000
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 20,000

domestic: One complimentary domestic airport lounge visit per quarter, subject to spending Rs 35,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
Complimentary domestic airport lounge access (1 visit per quarter) requires a minimum spend of Rs 35,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
Complimentary railway lounge access (1 visit per quarter) is unconditional (no spend criteria).
One complimentary railway lounge visit per quarter
international: Complimentary railway lounge access (1 visit per quarter) is unconditional (no spend criteria).
One complimentary railway lounge visit per quarter

milestones.label: 2,000 reward points on spending Rs 2,00,000 and 1,000 reward points each time Rs 1,00,000 spend is crossed thereafter in an anniversary year, capped at 10,000 points per year

milestoneBenefits: 2,000 reward points on spending Rs 2,00,000 and 1,000 reward points each time Rs 1,00,000 spend is crossed thereafter in an anniversary year, capped at 10,000 points per year
additionalBenefits: One complimentary domestic airport lounge visit per quarter, subject to spending Rs 35,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets, capped at Rs 100 twice a month, subject to spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
One complimentary railway lounge visit per quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver at HPCL petrol pumps
additionalDetails: A transaction fee of 1% applies to utility payments exceeding Rs 50,000 per month
Reward points can be transferred to Air India Maharaja Club at a 6:1 ratio (minimum 2,000 points)
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank Coral product page and notice revisions.
Annual fee of Rs 500 is waived on spending Rs 1.5 Lakhs or more in the previous anniversary year.
Base reward rate is 2 points per Rs 100 spent (0.5% return value); utility and insurance spends earn 1 point per Rs 100 spent (0.25% return value).
Utility and insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 40,000 per category.
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of Rs 20,000.
Complimentary domestic airport lounge access (1 visit per quarter) requires a minimum spend of Rs 35,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
Complimentary railway lounge access (1 visit per quarter) is unconditional (no spend criteria).
BookMyShow movie discount (25% off up to Rs 100 twice a month on min 2 tickets) requires spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding spends quarter (effective April 1, 2026).
Reward points can be transferred to Air India Maharaja Club at a 6:1 ratio, requiring a minimum of 2,000 points per transfer.
